note: Rx reliance verdicts over an EP-RX-RELIANCE-PACKET-v1 evaluated against an EP-RX-EVIDENCE-CHALLENGE-v1, composing the shipped EP-RELIANCE-KERNEL for the prescriber-authority/policy/revocation legs and adding Rx-specific signed-evidence legs (patient consent, diagnosis/lab, RTBP benefit freshness, signed denial). Scenario-driven: because a valid receipt + authority proof + signed artifacts require live signatures, each vector names a `break` applied to a fully-valid base packet, then asserts the closed rx verdict. expect.valid mirrors verdict==='rx_rely'. Two positives (a dispensable approve and a signed appeal-ready deny) plus a reject for every rx_do_not_rely_* verdict. PHI-free: consent and clinical evidence are signed digests.
